title: [MTR3/4] Gilgen Door Systems APG
description: Resource pack that adds Gilgen Door Systems APG to Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
This resource pack is to replace the stock APG in Minecraft Transit Railway mod with Gilgen Door Systems APG as seen on the Tuen Ma Line, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2025.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Gilgen Door Systems or its parent, Nabtesco.
